name: Benson & Hedges Gold
notes: A Smooth, full-flavored smoke with a naturally mild sweetness.

name: Manchester Blue
notes: Mild, balanced tobacco blend. Its smoke profile delivers a clean, smooth inhale with a subtle natural sweetness and light smoke density, resulting in an exceptionally gentle throat feel.

name: Manchester Royal Red
notes: Like a fake but better version of Marlboro Reds

name: Marlboro Purple Burst
notes: Marlboro Purple Burst cigarettes deliver a signature fusion of sweet, dark berry and rich Japanese grape notes, paired with an intense sub-zero menthol hit.

name: Marlboro Gold
notes: Marlboro Gold (formerly known as "Lights") features a smooth, light-bodied tobacco flavor. The tasting profile is characterized by a clean inhale, a significantly softer throat impact than the brand's Red variant, and a mild, natural, malty sweetness with subtle dried fruit undertones.
